title: BanditRoutingDecision
description: Schema for BanditRouter.select() inputs and outputs (CCW-MVP18).

task_type.description: Task category used to look up historical outcomes in the ledger (e.g. 'code_review', 'qa_campaign').

quality_threshold.description: Minimum acceptable quality_score for a model to be considered good.

cost_cap.description: Maximum acceptable estimated cost in USD per call (reserved for future cost-aware filtering).

epsilon.description: Exploration probability for epsilon-greedy bandit. 0.1 = 10% random exploration.

ladder_name.description: Escalation ladder to use for static fallback (e.g. 'sonnet' or 'haiku').

model_id.description: The model identifier selected by the router.

rung.description: Position of the selected model in the escalation ladder (0 = cheapest).

confidence.description: Mean quality_score of the selected model from historical ledger data; 0.0 for static/fallback selections.

source.description: bandit = selected by epsilon-greedy algorithm from ledger data; static = selected from YAML ladder (insufficient ledger data); fallback = selected from hardcoded defaults (no YAML available).
